---
name: Data accuracy report
about: The tool displays something that does not match its linked primary source
title: "[data] "
labels: data-accuracy
---

**Page where the problem appears**
URL of the profile/search/topic page on your instance:

**What the tool displays**
Quote or screenshot the incorrect content:

**What the primary source actually says**
Link the primary source (the same one the tool links, or a better one) and
quote the relevant part:

**Type of error**
- [ ] Statement attributed to the wrong person
- [ ] Wrong vote position / result
- [ ] Wrong date
- [ ] Broken or wrong source link
- [ ] Text does not match the source verbatim
- [ ] Other (describe)
